shapes.name: Certainty
shapes.description: Veritas certainty about another assertion. This shape is intended for assertions whose about target is itself an assertion. The target assertion must semantically denote a binomial true/false proposition for Veritas to work correctly. The certainty expresses subjective-logic belief, disbelief, uncertainty, optional alpha, and required source Thing for that target assertion.

belief.description: Subjective-logic belief that the target assertion is true.

disbelief.description: Subjective-logic disbelief that the target assertion is true.

uncertainty.description: Residual uncertainty about the truth of the target assertion.

alpha.description: Optional base rate for the target assertion. Veritas treats omitted alpha as 0.5.

source.description: Required source Thing whose Veritas reputation is wagered by this certainty.

rationale.description: Optional freeform text explaining why this certainty was assigned.

shapes.name: Support
shapes.description: Veritas support opinion about another assertion pair. This shape represents the belief that one assertion supports another assertion. It is intended for assertions whose about target is a Pair of assertions, where the first assertion supports the second assertion. Pair direction matters: first -> second. The source field identifies the Thing whose Veritas reputation is wagered by this opinion.

belief.description: Subjective-logic belief that the first assertion in the Pair supports the second assertion.

disbelief.description: Subjective-logic disbelief that the first assertion in the Pair supports the second assertion.

uncertainty.description: Residual uncertainty about whether the first assertion in the Pair supports the second assertion.

alpha.description: Optional base rate for the support relation. Veritas treats omitted alpha as 0.5.

source.description: Required source Thing whose Veritas reputation is wagered by this support opinion.

rationale.description: Optional freeform text explaining why this support opinion was assigned.

shapes.name: Opposition
shapes.description: Veritas opposition opinion about another assertion pair. This shape represents the belief that one assertion opposes another assertion. It is intended for assertions whose about target is a Pair of assertions, where the first assertion opposes the second assertion. Pair direction matters: first -> second. The source field identifies the Thing whose Veritas reputation is wagered by this opinion.

belief.description: Subjective-logic belief that the first assertion in the Pair opposes the second assertion.

disbelief.description: Subjective-logic disbelief that the first assertion in the Pair opposes the second assertion.

uncertainty.description: Residual uncertainty about whether the first assertion in the Pair opposes the second assertion.

alpha.description: Optional base rate for the opposition relation. Veritas treats omitted alpha as 0.5.

source.description: Required source Thing whose Veritas reputation is wagered by this opposition opinion.

rationale.description: Optional freeform text explaining why this opposition opinion was assigned.

shapes.name: Consensus
shapes.description: Veritas consolidated consensus opinion for a target assertion. This shape is intended for assertions whose about target is the assertion being consolidated. Veritas writes this as its only repo-visible output shape.

belief.description: Veritas consolidated subjective-logic belief for the target assertion.

disbelief.description: Veritas consolidated subjective-logic disbelief for the target assertion.

alpha.description: Optional base rate for the consolidated opinion. Veritas treats omitted alpha as 0.5.

credentials.name: veritas-webhook-<org-name>-<repo-name>
credentials.description: Repo-local webhook signing secret bound to Veritas subscriptions so the worker can verify WarmHub deliveries.

requiredKeys.description: Shared secret WarmHub uses to sign webhook deliveries sent to the Veritas worker.
